title: Resume upload with target role begins processing
description: Verifies a signed-in user can upload a resume, select a target role, and see processing begin.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /onboarding
Select a target role
Attach a valid resume PDF file to the resume upload control
Submit the resume for processing
Verify a processing state indicator is displayed

title: Sign in and reach onboarding resume upload
description: Verifies a job seeker can sign in and access the authenticated onboarding experience to start resume ingestion.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click to start onboarding
Verify the resume upload and target role inputs are available

title: Resume processing completes and dashboard shows structured profile
description: Verifies the user can wait for resume processing to complete and then view the resulting structured profile on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /onboarding
Select a target role
Attach a valid resume PDF file to the resume upload control
Submit the resume for processing
Wait for the processing status to change to complete
Continue to the dashboard
Verify structured profile data is displayed on the dashboard

title: Generate roadmap from completed analysis and view results
description: Verifies a signed-in user can generate a roadmap from an existing profile and gap analysis and sees the roadmap outputs rendered on the dashboard.
category: Deep Researcher Agent (Roadmap & Action Plan Synthesis)

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to go to onboarding
Complete resume submission by selecting a target role and submitting a valid resume using the UI controls
Wait for the resume processing to complete and the app to transition to the dashboard
Trigger gap analysis from the dashboard and wait for results to appear
Trigger roadmap generation from the dashboard and wait for results to appear
Verify a roadmap output is displayed including learning steps, projects, checklist items, and priorities

title: Start job search from completed profile and view ranked listings
description: Verifies a signed-in user can run job search and sees ranked job listings with match scores and outbound links.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to go to onboarding
Complete resume submission by selecting a target role and submitting a valid resume using the UI controls
Wait for the resume processing to complete and the app to transition to the dashboard
Trigger gap analysis from the dashboard and wait for results to appear
Trigger job search from the dashboard and wait for results to appear
Verify ranked job listings are displayed with match scores and outbound URLs

title: Roadmap generation is dependency-aware and ordered
description: Verifies the generated roadmap presents coherent priorities and an ordering that reflects dependencies between steps and projects.
category: Deep Researcher Agent (Roadmap & Action Plan Synthesis)

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to go to onboarding
Complete resume submission by selecting a target role and submitting a valid resume using the UI controls
Wait for the resume processing to complete and the app to transition to the dashboard
Trigger gap analysis from the dashboard and wait for results to appear
Trigger roadmap generation from the dashboard and wait for results to appear
Verify the roadmap shows a clear ordered sequence of steps with prerequisite relationships reflected in the ordering

title: Job search supports changing target role and rerunning
description: Verifies the user can adjust the target role for job search and receive an updated set of results without breaking the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to go to onboarding
Complete resume submission by selecting a target role and submitting a valid resume using the UI controls
Wait for the resume processing to complete and the app to transition to the dashboard
Trigger gap analysis from the dashboard and wait for results to appear
Open job search settings on the dashboard
Select a different target role for job search
Trigger job search and wait for results to appear
Verify job results are displayed for the updated target role selection

title: Dashboard route guard redirects unauthenticated users to login
description: Verifies unauthenticated users cannot access the dashboard and are routed to the login experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the login experience is displayed

title: Roadmap generation prevents duplicate concurrent runs
description: Verifies the dashboard prevents or safely handles repeated roadmap generation attempts without creating a broken or duplicated roadmap view.
category: Deep Researcher Agent (Roadmap & Action Plan Synthesis)

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to go to onboarding
Complete resume submission by selecting a target role and submitting a valid resume using the UI controls
Wait for the resume processing to complete and the app to transition to the dashboard
Trigger gap analysis from the dashboard and wait for results to appear
Trigger roadmap generation from the dashboard
Trigger roadmap generation again while the first generation is still in progress
Verify the UI shows a single roadmap generation in progress and does not render duplicate or conflicting roadmap outputs

title: Roadmap remains visible after navigating within dashboard
description: Verifies that once a roadmap is generated, the user can navigate to other dashboard sections and return without losing the displayed roadmap.
category: Deep Researcher Agent (Roadmap & Action Plan Synthesis)

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to go to onboarding
Complete resume submission by selecting a target role and submitting a valid resume using the UI controls
Wait for the resume processing to complete and the app to transition to the dashboard
Trigger gap analysis from the dashboard and wait for results to appear
Trigger roadmap generation from the dashboard and wait for results to appear
Click to view the job search section of the dashboard
Click to return to the roadmap section of the dashboard
Verify the previously generated roadmap output is still displayed

title: Job search prevents duplicate concurrent runs
description: Verifies the UI prevents or safely handles repeated job search attempts while a search is already running.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to go to onboarding
Complete resume submission by selecting a target role and submitting a valid resume using the UI controls
Wait for the resume processing to complete and the app to transition to the dashboard
Trigger gap analysis from the dashboard and wait for results to appear
Trigger job search from the dashboard
Trigger job search again while the first search is still in progress
Verify the UI shows a single job search in progress and does not render duplicate or conflicting results

title: Job result links are usable from the dashboard
description: Verifies that job cards provide accessible outbound URLs that the user can interact with to view the posting details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to go to onboarding
Complete resume submission by selecting a target role and submitting a valid resume using the UI controls
Wait for the resume processing to complete and the app to transition to the dashboard
Trigger gap analysis from the dashboard and wait for results to appear
Trigger job search from the dashboard and wait for results to appear
Click a job listing outbound link
Verify the browser navigates away from the app to an external job posting page

title: Roadmap section handles empty state before generation
description: Verifies the dashboard shows an appropriate empty state for the roadmap section before any roadmap is generated.
category: Deep Researcher Agent (Roadmap & Action Plan Synthesis)

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to go to onboarding
Complete resume submission by selecting a target role and submitting a valid resume using the UI controls
Wait for the resume processing to complete and the app to transition to the dashboard
Verify the roadmap section indicates no roadmap has been generated yet and provides a clear way to start generation

title: Invalid credentials prevent sign-in
description: Verifies a user entering invalid credentials cannot sign in and is shown an authentication error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid-user@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error is displayed
Verify the user remains on the login experience

title: Job listings empty state is handled
description: Verifies that if no job results are available, the dashboard shows a clear empty state instead of a broken or blank UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to go to onboarding
Complete resume submission by selecting a target role and submitting a valid resume using the UI controls
Wait for the resume processing to complete and the app to transition to the dashboard
Trigger gap analysis from the dashboard and wait for results to appear
Trigger job search from the dashboard and wait for completion
Verify either job listings are displayed or an empty state message is visible indicating no matches were found
